sizing_rule.note: Risk 1.0% per trade for third-party capital, 2.0% for personal capital. Position size = (Account_Equity × Risk_Pct) / (Entry_Price − Stop_Loss). Stricter limits applied to entrusted funds.

source_rule_text: A trader should calibrate position sizing risk percentage based on whether capital is their own or entrusted, with external capital requiring stricter risk limits than personal capital.
